case_title: BANK OF THE WEST VS. FOCUS 4 INC.

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-26-2016 CONTINUED TO DEC-28-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S) FOCUS 4 INC.; FOR BANKRUPTCY STATUS OF FITTS DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT POS BY MAIL, AFFIDAVIT OF DUE DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 59345170), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF THE WEST SERVED JUN-21-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FITTS JR., JAMES R AN INDIVIDUAL

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60052776)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-01-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
